## Summary / 概要
<!-- What changed and why? 何を変更し、なぜ必要かを書いてください。 -->

## Related Issue / 関連Issue
<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of Change / 変更種別
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Chore

## Safety Impact / 安全性への影響
- [ ] No direct safety impact
- [ ] Safety-critical path touched (policy/auth/audit/streaming/token/enclave)
- [ ] Failure-case tests added for changed behavior

## Validation / 確認内容
- [ ] `cargo fmt` (or equivalent formatter)
- [ ] `cargo clippy` / lint checks
- [ ] Relevant tests pass locally
- [ ] Updated docs if behavior changed

## Notes for Reviewers / レビューポイント
<!-- Focus points, tradeoffs, and known limitations. -->
